sql.if: AND (b.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.inquery_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.sql: a.id ,a.request_user ,a.status ,a.category_id ,a.inquery_title ,a.inquery_content ,a.response_user ,a.response_content ,a.response_date ,a.response_inquery ,a.score ,a.create_date ,a.create_id ,a.modified_date ,a.modified_id ,a.display_yn ,b.username AS createUserName ,c.user_name AS responseNm ,d.code_name AS categoryNm
mapper.select: SELECT count(1) FROM tb_csm_one_to_one_inquiry a LEFT JOIN tb_mbm_user b ON a.create_id = b.id LEFT JOIN tb_mbm_admin_user c ON a.modified_id = c.id LEFT JOIN tb_cmm_code d ON a.category_id = d.code AND d.code_group='onetoone_cate' WHERE 1=1

SELECT
FROM tb_csm_one_to_one_inquiry a LEFT JOIN tb_mbm_user b ON a.create_id = b.id LEFT JOIN tb_mbm_admin_user c ON a.modified_id = c.id LEFT JOIN tb_cmm_code d ON a.category_id = d.code AND d.code_group='onetoone_cate' WHERE a.id = #{id}
mapper.update:
UPDATE tb_csm_one_to_one_inquiry SET modified_id = #{modifiedId},
request_user = #{requestUser},
status = #{status},
category_id = #{categoryId},
response_user = #{responseUser}, response_date = Now(),
response_content = COALESCE(#{responseContent}, response_content),
score = #{score},
display_yn = #{displayYn},
modified_date = Now() WHERE id = #{id}
